summary: Sixth testing round for GS Pinnacle IAS - MAJOR REWRITE: Course Section/Folder System. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified. Admin can create sections (folders) within courses, add videos/PDFs to each section, toggle lock/unlock per section. Students see sections as expandable folders with locked/unlocked state. Unlocked sections expand to show videos (play button) and materials (download button). Razorpay payment uses WebView imported at top of file (not IIFE). First course has 8 sections with nested content from testing.

integration_issues.issue: Clicking 'Courses' tab in bottom navigation does not navigate to Course Management page. User must navigate directly to /(admin)/manage-courses URL. This is a minor UX issue but does not block functionality.

action_items: Fix admin bottom tab navigation - 'Courses' tab should navigate to manage-courses screen (currently stays on dashboard)
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend: POST /api/courses/{courseId}/sections creates section with title, order, is_locked (200 OK)
✓ Backend: Section response includes id, course_id, title, order, is_locked, created_at
✓ Backend: Create section requires admin authentication (401 without auth)
✓ Backend: GET /api/courses/{courseId}/sections returns sections array sorted by order
✓ Backend: Each section includes nested videos[] and materials[] arrays
✓ Backend: Videos and materials are filtered by section_id and included in respective section
✓ Backend: PUT /api/sections/{sectionId} can toggle is_locked field (True/False)
✓ Backend: Update section requires admin authentication (401 without auth)
✓ Backend: DELETE /api/sections/{sectionId} deletes section and returns success (200 OK)
✓ Backend: Delete section also deletes associated videos and materials (cascade delete)
✓ Backend: Delete section requires admin authentication (401 without auth)
✓ Backend: POST /api/courses/{courseId}/videos with section_id field works correctly
✓ Backend: Video with section_id appears in section's videos[] array in GET /sections response

success_rate.frontend: 95% (All UI elements verified, minor navigation issue)

seed_data_creation: First course (UPSC Prelims Foundation 2026, ID: f4610d5d-53c1-47e2-a3be-0c2873cbfd4a) now has 8 sections from testing: 'Week 1 - Introduction' (1 video, 0 files), 'TEST_Lock_63e596dc' (0 videos, 0 files), 'TEST_VideoSection_7b2f8592' (1 video, 0 files), 'TEST_MaterialSection_d76c8789' (0 videos, 1 file), 'TEST_Section_c2c0d3ec' (0 videos, 0 files), 'TEST_Order_1_ec8a' (0 videos, 0 files), 'TEST_Order_2_9b48' (0 videos, 0 files), 'TEST_Order_3_2508' (0 videos, 0 files). All sections are unlocked (is_locked: false).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 is a MAJOR REWRITE implementing course section/folder system. Backend has new endpoints: POST /api/courses/{id}/sections (create section with title, order, is_locked), GET /api/courses/{id}/sections (list sections with nested videos[] and materials[]), PUT /api/sections/{id} (update section, toggle lock), DELETE /api/sections/{id} (delete section and cascade to content). Videos and materials now have section_id field. Admin UI: Course Management page at /(admin)/manage-courses shows 'Manage Sections & Content' button on each course card. Clicking opens modal with 'Add section' input, existing sections list. Each section has Lock/Open toggle (green=open, red=locked), delete button, and expands to show Add Video form and Upload PDF button. Student UI: Course detail page shows sections as expandable folders. Locked sections show lock icon and 'Locked' badge. Unlocked sections expand to show videos (play button) and materials (download button). Payment uses WebView imported at top of file (line 5), not IIFE. All backend APIs working (10/10 tests passed). All frontend UI elements verified. Minor issue: Admin 'Courses' tab in bottom navigation doesn't navigate to Course Management page (must use direct URL). First course has 8 sections from testing. Admin login: krsittu@gmail.com / Indra@4.
rca_of_issue: No critical issues found. All backend APIs working correctly (10/10 tests passed). All frontend UI elements present and functional. Section management modal opens correctly, shows section list with lock toggles and delete buttons, expands to show video/PDF forms. Student course detail shows sections as folders with lock/unlock icons, expands to show content. WebView correctly imported at top of file. Minor navigation issue: Admin bottom tab 'Courses' click doesn't navigate to manage-courses screen (stays on dashboard). This is likely a tab navigation configuration issue in _layout.tsx or the tab is rendering the wrong component. Workaround: Navigate directly to /(admin)/manage-courses URL.
